sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) active noun of the preceding verb, putting on, binding on (of the Ephod), Exo 28:8.

(2) covering (of gold), or over laying of a statue, Isa 30:22 i.q. צִפּוּי. They used to make the images of idols, of wood or earthenware, and then lay over them plates of gold or silver (περίχρυσα, περιάργυρα, ep. Jer. 6:34 ).
